name: Reliable Money Order Inc
description_short: Unable to verify company details—website displays only Cloudflare security verification page with no accessible business information.
description_long: Reliable Money Order Inc is listed as a check-cashing service provider operating under the URL us.maptons.com. However, the company's actual website is inaccessible for verification purposes. When attempting to access the provided URL, the page displays only a Cloudflare security verification interface, preventing review of company details, service offerings, licensing information, or operational specifics. This represents a significant limitation in assessing the legitimacy and scope of the business. Without access to verifiable company information, contact details, or service descriptions directly from the company's web presence, it is impossible to confirm the accuracy of the business name, location, hours of operation, fee structures, or specific services offered. The reliance on third-party directory listings (Maptons.com) further complicates verification. For consumers considering using this service, the inability to access a functioning company website raises concerns about digital presence and accessibility. The check-cashing category suggests the company may offer money orders, bill payment services, wire transfers, and related financial services typical of this sector, but this cannot be confirmed from available data. Any profile information beyond the basic category classification would be speculative without direct website access or independent verification from regulatory bodies.

diagnosis: Cannot recommend without verification. The complete inaccessibility of the company website prevents assessment of whether Reliable Money Order Inc is an active, licensed business. Consumers should verify the company's existence through state financial regulatory agencies, the Better Business Bureau, or other independent sources before conducting transactions.
